name: pos-test-automation
description: End-to-end + API test suite for a Next.js Distribution POS — Cypress, Playwright, and Postman/Newman. (App source not included.)

scripts.test:api: newman run postman/POS.postman_collection.json -e postman/POS.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export newman/report.html
